content_body: We enjoyed our stay! We had a mini vacation from home. . . just the husband, son, and my mother too. It was a long trip but we enjoyed the cabin and relaxed. We enjoyed each other's company! We made some awesome memories in Chattanooga at the aquarium and the Imax. We also enjoyed fishing a mini golf in Blue Ridge! The cabin was beautiful and relaxing. The staff helped ensure things were perfect. Beautiful views from the cabin! We have wonderful memories to last a lifetime and it was a nice relaxing break from reality for a few days!
title: A Beautiful, Relaxing, Mini-Vacation at Sanctuary
